leadText: The Blue Apricorn (Japanese: あおぼんぐり Blue Bonguri), formatted Blu Apricorn prior to Generation VI, is a type of Apricorn introduced in Generation II. It can be used to make a Lure Ball.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Blue Apricorn can be made into a Lure Ball by Kurt . If used in the Apriblender , it can produce Aprijuice that boosts the Skill Performance stat.

sections.title: Description

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Ice Berry trees in Generation II are replaced by Blue Apricorn trees in Generation IV . The Ylw Apricorn and Blu Apricorn swapped index numbers between Generation IV and Generation V . They are the only items to do so between those two generations.
